channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: One Nation’s Farrer win sparks debate on coalition alliances and government policy influence
item.description: One Nation has made its first breakthrough in federal politics with a win in the Farrer byelection, prompting renewed discussion about the party's role and influence. Barnaby Joyce, who joined One Nat...

item.title: Police seek witnesses following discovery of man's body in ditch
item.description: Police authorities have issued a public appeal for witnesses following the discovery of a man's body in a ditch. The incident occurred recently, and investigators are urging anyone who may have seen a...

item.title: U.S. Army Soldier's Remains Found After Training Incident in Morocco
item.description: The U.S. Army announced that Moroccan military personnel recovered the body of First Lt. Kendrick Lamont Key Jr., a 27-year-old Air Defense Artillery officer from Richmond, Virginia, on May 9, 2026. K...

item.title: Union-Funded Ad Targeting Spencer Pratt May Backfire, Potentially Boosting His Mayoral Campaign
item.description: A recent political advertisement aimed at opposing Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt has generated unexpected attention online, with some critics suggesting it might actually strengthen his ...

item.title: Professional registration seen as key to improving municipal service delivery

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 BAFTA TV Awards: Stephen Graham and Owen Cooper Among Winners
item.description: The 2026 BAFTA TV Awards at the Royal Festival Hall saw several standout moments, including Stephen Graham finally winning the Leading Actor award for 'Adolescence' after eight previous nominations. T...

item.title: Iran warns of retaliation after drones hit vessels in Gulf waters
item.description: Tensions in the Persian Gulf escalated as Iran declared it would no longer exercise restraint following recent U.S. strikes. On Sunday, multiple drones targeted vessels in the Gulf, including a freigh...

item.title: RCMP Search for Snowmobiler Missing Near B.C.-Yukon Boundary
item.description: Mounties are actively searching for a snowmobiler from Whitehorse who went missing near the B.C.-Yukon border. The incident occurred when three snowmobilers went to retrieve a broken snow machine near...

item.title: Martin Short reflects on daughter’s death and mental health advocacy
item.description: Martin Short, the renowned Canadian-American actor, has publicly addressed the tragic death of his daughter, Katherine Hartley Short, who took her own life at the age of 42 earlier this year. Speaking...

item.title: Family Driver Arrested in Pasay for Stealing P640,000 Worth of Employer's Jewelry
item.description: Authorities in Pasay City arrested a family driver after it was discovered that he stole jewelry valued at around P640,000 from his employer. The items were reportedly listed on an online marketplace,...

item.title: Amazon removes high-speed e-bikes in California after safety concerns and fatalities
item.description: Amazon has agreed to halt the sale of certain high-speed e-bikes in California after a series of fatal collisions involving both teenagers and adults. The decision follows a consumer alert by Californ...

item.title: Aliko Dangote plans $15bn refinery in Mombasa to serve East Africa
item.description: Nigerian billionaire Aliko Dangote is exploring the establishment of a large-scale oil refinery in Kenya, potentially in Mombasa, which he cites as having a larger and deeper port compared to Tanzania...

item.title: Linda Ejiofor Makes History at 2026 AMVCA by Winning Both Lead and Supporting Actress Awards
item.description: Linda Ejiofor don make correct history for Nollywood as she become di first actress wey win both Best Lead Actress and Best Supporting Actress for di Africa Magic Viewers’ Choice Awards (AMVCA) 2026. ...

item.title: Shiksha Arora Supports New Mothers by Paying Hospital Bills at Pumwani

item.title: Tamil Nadu state song played third at CM Vijay's swearing-in sparks debate

item.title: Trump Rejects Iran's Peace Proposal Amid Ongoing Middle East Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump rejected Iran's response to a recent US proposal for peace talks, prolonging the conflict that has lasted for over 10 weeks, affecting Iran, Lebanon, and international mariti...

item.title: LTO issues show cause order to government agency over SUV with unauthorized red plate
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has issued a show cause order against an unnamed government agency and the driver of one of its SUVs for using an improvised red license plate. The vehicle, which ...

item.title: North York toddler fatally falls from apartment, police investigating
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in North York, Ontario, on Sunday when a toddler fell from a high-rise apartment building located at Don Mills Road and Graydon Hall Drive. Emergency services responded prom...
